children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: assert 400 == 201
 +  where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
An RTP is sent through CBI API

AssertionError: assert 201 == 400
 +  where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code
Cannot send RTP with an amount over the POSTE limit
Cannot send RTP with expired date

AssertionError: Error cancelling RTP, got 404
assert 404 == 204
 +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
An RFC callback DS12N RJCR is successfully received and RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL
Unauthorized RFC callback due to wrong certificate serial
Failed RFC callback for non existing Service Provider - DS-12N RJCR compliant
An RFC callback DS12N INVALID is rejected with 400
An RFC callback DS12P CNCL is successfully received and RTP status is CANCEL
Unauthorized RFC callback due to wrong certificate serial
Failed RFC callback for non existing Service Provider - DS-12P CNCL compliant
An RFC callback DS12P INVALID is rejected with 400

AssertionError: assert 404 == 204
 +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
RTP is successfully cancelled

AssertionError: Expected 201 but got 409
assert 409 == 201
 +  where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
Happy path: a debt position is created and published in DEV environment
Happy path: a debt position is deleted in DEV environment
Happy path: a debt position is updated in DEV environment
